texto: What has been happening more lately - of course, I also put in my bio, I say I do the voice of Goliath, but some people go - you know, I say something, and it's a funny thing when you work in this business, people will talk out loud in front of you like you're not there.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Keith David: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “What has been happening more lately - of course, I also put in my bio, I say I do the voice of Go…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, funny, work pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e work.

frase_original: What has been happening more lately - of course, I also put in my bio, I say I do the voice of Goliath, but some people go - you know, I say something, and it's a funny thing when you work in this business, people will talk out loud in front of you like you're not there.
